prompts.prompt: I just edited src/backend/access/heap/heapam.c in this PostgreSQL workspace. What's the fastest rebuild + regression-test cycle to verify I didn't break anything? Give exact commands.
assertions: mentions ninja -C dev/build-debug install or similar
uses meson test or ninja test with --suite setup alongside --suite regress (or runs full test target)
does NOT instruct user to run from source/ tree

prompts.prompt: I want to step through PostgreSQL backend code with lldb while it executes a query. How do I attach to the right process? I'm running on macOS.
assertions: explains per-connection fork model (postmaster forks a backend per connection)
mentions SELECT pg_backend_pid() to get the backend PID
mentions attaching to the forked backend, NOT the postmaster
mentions single-user mode (postgres --single) as alternative for startup paths

prompts.prompt: I ran 'meson test -C dev/build-debug --suite regress' and got 'copying of initdb template failed'. What went wrong and how do I fix it?
assertions: identifies missing --suite setup as the cause
explains tmp_install / initdb-template / initdb_cache needs to be built first
gives corrected command including --suite setup alongside --suite regress
does NOT suggest wiping the build dir or reinstalling toolchain as first remedy
